title: Flood protection works in Sultanganj inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Sultanganj.

title: High stakes battle in Sultanganj as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Sultanganj. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Political rally in Sultanganj draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Sultanganj promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Sultanganj
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Sultanganj constituency.

title: Women voters of Sultanganj demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Sultanganj has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Sultanganj
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Sultanganj assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Sultanganj triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Sultanganj, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
